30. Choose the correct form of the verb to complete the sentence below. Some experts agree that if nothing ... to prevent the spread of malaria, the death rate could double within the next twenty years.
• is done
O has been done
O was done
O cannot be done
• is done

31. Choose the correct answer to complete the sentence below. ...
some older microscopes had only one lens, modern microscopes make use of multiple lenses to enlarge an image.
O While
• Before
O Therefore
O Once
O While

Choose the correct form to complete the dialogue. I think I should write about the history of our company, ...?
O shouldn't I
O don'ti
O so dol
O neither do I
O shouldn't I

Choose the correct answer to complete the sentence below. It was a wonderful day for Helen Keller when Ann Sullivan arrived in March 1887 to take charge of the child who could ... hear ... speak.
O either/or
O also/and
O both/and
• neither/nor
• neither/nor

correctly-formed reported speech.
She said, "Why don't you get a mechanic to look at the car?"
• She suggested that I should get a
mechanic to look at the car
• She suggested that I had got a
mechanic to look at the car
O she suggested that I couldn't get
a mechanic to look at the car
O she suggested that I get a
mechanic to look at the car
• She suggested that I get a mechanic to look at the car

Choose the correct answer to complete the sentence below. As
programmers, you may have spent ... of time on learning different skills or technologies. To practice them, you may have created some weekend projects which would not take your too long while implementing something you find interesting.
O enough
• little
O much
O plenty
• little

36. Choose the best answer to complete the sentence below.
Why's she late? Well, she ... to the wrong office.
O should have gone
O couldn't have gone
O mustn't have gone
• might have gone
• might have gone

Choose the answer with correctly-formed reported speech.
The account holder said to the bank clerk, "Please issue me a fresh cheque book. I have used up the old ones."
• The account holder asks the bank
clerk that he issues him a fresh cheque book and mentions that he has used up the old ones
• The account holder requested
the bank clerk to issue him a fresh cheque book and told that he had used up the old ones
• The account holder said to the
bank clerk that he would issue him a fresh cheque book and he had used up the old ones
• The account holder approached
to the bank clerk that he issued him a fresh cheque book and explained that he used up the
• The account holder requested the bank clerk to issue him a fresh cheque book and told that he had used up the old ones

Choose the sentence which has
ONE grammatical mistake. (1) Miko is a school student and here's what she does on a typical weekday. (2) In the morning she usually gets up early and feeding the dogs. (3) Then, she has a shower, eats her breakfast and gets prepared for school. (4)
After school, she exercises, does homework, texts with her friends, and watches some TV before going to bed.
• Ist sentence
O and sentence
O 3rd sentence
O 4th sentence
(2) In the morning she usually gets up early and feeding the dogs.

40. Choose the correct answer to complete the sentence below. I do wish you ... going off with my car without asking me beforehand.
